summary: Route formal M7 content lock acceptance Human Gate
acceptance_criteria: Synthesize reviewed M7 content, culture, balance, performance, platform, UI/localization/visual quality, save-boundary, and manual playthrough evidence into a formal content lock recommendation.
Formal content lock acceptance is a Human Gate. Without explicit product-owner approval, this task must remain BLOCKED or PARTIAL and must not mark content locked.

After lock, permitted autonomous work is limited to defect fixes, compatibility fixes, and explicit balance tuning; no new large system, content expansion, release/commercial/branding, telemetry, server, cloud, or mod decision is allowed.
M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS, and M7 lock must not erase Alpha/local evidence limits or desktop unsigned-smoke limitations.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; content lock cannot reverse it or make manual node battle a M7/M8 blocker.
Do not recommend formal content lock while M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 is incomplete, BLOCKED without accepted rationale, or missing systems/QA review evidence.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001
notes: M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS and must not be rewritten as unconditional PASS or release readiness.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; this task must not create implementation, M7/M8 blocking spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency for manual node battle.
Player and AI behavior must continue through the same GameCommand/query/save surfaces where implementation work is later authorized.
sim-core must remain decoupled from React, Pixi, Electron, DOM, Node IO, real time APIs, hidden RPC, and object-graph serialization.
Stop and route to the named reviewer or Human Gate if allowed paths are insufficient, required tests cannot run, or a Human Gate decision is needed.
M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 is a required prerequisite so formal content lock cannot pass while the UI/localization/visual quality track remains unfinished.
UX recovery validation is now closed in main, but this task remains BLOCKED until the product owner explicitly accepts, defers, or requests changes for formal M7 content lock.
Second product-owner REQUEST_CHANGES received after UX recovery validation: obligation handling, appointment feedback, and phase/action loop remain blockers.
Systemic interaction recovery validation is now closed in main, but this task remains BLOCKED until the product owner explicitly accepts, defers, or requests changes for formal M7 content lock.
human_gates: manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required
commercial, release, store, branding, logo, or trademark decisions
telemetry, analytics, remote collection, accounts, paid services, or secrets
arbitrary-code mods, runtime scripting extensions, or Workshop support
cloud-save implementation, network persistence, or any account-backed save service
frozen product, platform, core architecture, technology stack, simulation authority, deterministic, or historical-policy changes
manual node battle reversal or any formal 1.0 scope reversal
next_action: Product-owner Human Gate decision required: choose APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or REQUEST_CHANGES. Do not start M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 until this gate is resolved.
